name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in a comp claim?
description: Medical + 2/3 wages + impairment; often settles for thousands after treatment.

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in a comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + 2/3 wages + impairment; often settles for thousands after treatment.
acceptedAnswer.description: Value depends on medical bills, lost wages (typically 2/3 of average weekly wage), permanent impairment rating, and future earning loss; averages 1-2 years to settle post-treatment. Key factors: AMA impairment guides disability pay; age, job affect multipliers; Utah/Idaho cap non-economic. Gather bills/rehab records; negotiate settlement after max medical improvement. Attorney maximizes value without trial.
